title: Water Utilities
description: Specialist environmental services for water and wastewater infrastructure. Watercourse management, vegetation clearance around treatment works, and emergency response for flood and storm events.
painPoints: Maintaining vegetation around water infrastructure in live operational environments
Meeting stringent environmental and water quality compliance requirements
Responding rapidly to storm damage and flooding incidents
Finding contractors qualified to work safely in and around water

title: Energy & Telecoms
description: Vegetation management and site clearance for energy generation, distribution networks, and telecoms infrastructure. Operating safely around live assets with full NRSWA traffic management capability.
painPoints: Vegetation encroachment threatening network reliability and safety clearances
Need for qualified teams who understand live working environments
Balancing planned maintenance programmes with reactive emergency call-outs
Traffic management requirements for roadside and highway network assets

title: Local Authorities
description: Planned grounds maintenance, vegetation management, and reactive works for councils and public estate. Estate-wide programmes delivered to measurable standards with full compliance documentation.
painPoints: Managing large estates with reducing budgets and increasing scrutiny
Meeting public expectations for open space and grounds quality
Ensuring contractor compliance with health, safety, and environmental standards
Responding to emergency and storm incidents affecting public areas

title: Housing Associations
description: Estate grounds maintenance, vegetation management, and responsive repairs for housing providers. Planned programmes that maintain property standards and resident satisfaction.
painPoints: Maintaining grounds across dispersed housing estates efficiently
Meeting resident expectations and responding to complaints promptly
Ensuring contractors are qualified and DBS-checked for residential environments
Balancing planned maintenance with reactive requests

title: Tier 1 Contractors
description: Specialist sub-contractor for vegetation clearance, site preparation, soft dig, and reinstatement on major infrastructure programmes. Managed delivery model with a highly vetted, qualified supply chain.
painPoints: Finding specialist sub-contractors who hold the right qualifications
Supply chain reliability and ability to scale with programme demands
SSSTS, SMSTS, and CSCS compliance across all operatives
Need for self-delivered capability rather than further sub-contracting
